assertions.title: KindleFeatureVersion True==1 equivalence in capability lookup
assertions.evidence: All 3 tests passed. kindle_feature_version with true and 1 produce identical results, matching Python's True==1 behavior.

assertions.title: Color alpha threshold consistency between css_values.go and yj_property_info.go
assertions.evidence: Both tests passed. Alpha thresholds are consistent across both code paths.

assertions.title: is_kpf_prepub adds $610 to unreferenced fragment types
assertions.evidence: Test passed. When is_kpf_prepub=true, $610 is added to unreferenced_fragment_types. Log confirms: 'Unreferenced fragments: [($610, position_data_1)]'
assertions.testOutput:
--- PASS: TestFragmentValidation_KpfPrepub610 (0.00s)
2026/04/19 12:27:48 kfx: error: Unreferenced fragments: [($610, position_data_1)]

assertions.title: ion_data_eq detects content-differing duplicate fragments as fatal
assertions.evidence: Test passed. Duplicate fragments with different values trigger fatal error ('Book appears to have KFX containers from multiple books'). Identical duplicates get warning only.
assertions.testOutput:
--- PASS: TestFragmentValidation_DuplicateDetection (0.00s)
2026/04/19 12:27:48 kfx: warning: Duplicate fragment: ($164, resource1)
2026/04/19 12:27:48 kfx: fatal: Book appears to have KFX containers from multiple books. (duplicate fragments)

assertions.title: is_kpf_prepub cleanup removes $391/$266/$259/$260/$608 from unreferenced
assertions.evidence: Test passed. When is_kpf_prepub=true, $391, $266, $259, $260, $608 are correctly removed from unreferenced list.
assertions.testOutput:
--- PASS: TestFragmentValidation_KpfPrepubCleanup (0.00s)
2026/04/19 12:27:48 kfx: error: Unreferenced fragments: [($391, nav1) ($266, style1) ($259, story1) ($260, section1) ($608, content1)]

assertions.title: ion_data_eq function implemented for Ion value comparison
assertions.evidence: All 6 tests passed. ion_data_eq correctly compares all Ion types for structural equality including NaN handling.
assertions.testOutput:
--- PASS: TestIonDataEq_Equal (0.00s)
--- PASS: TestIonDataEq_Different (0.00s)
--- PASS: TestIonDataEq_Struct (0.00s)
--- PASS: TestIonDataEq_Slice (0.00s)
--- PASS: TestIonDataEq_Nested (0.00s)
--- PASS: TestIonDataEq_FloatNaN (0.00s)

assertions.title: is_sample/is_dictionary handling for unreferenced $597 fragments
assertions.evidence: Test passed. When is_sample or is_dictionary is true, unreferenced $597 fragments are silently accepted.
assertions.testOutput:
--- PASS: TestFragmentValidation_SampleDict597 (0.00s)
2026/04/19 12:27:48 kfx: error: Unreferenced fragments: [($597, extra_data)]

assertions.title: EXPECTED_DICTIONARY_ANNOTATIONS checked only for dictionaries
assertions.evidence: Test passed. Dictionary annotations are only checked when is_dictionary=true; non-dictionary books correctly flag unexpected annotations.

assertions.title: is_dictionary/is_scribe_notebook skips rebuild container processing
assertions.evidence: Test passed. Dictionary and scribe notebook types correctly skip $270 container regeneration during rebuild.

summary: Tested 9 assertions (18 test functions): all 9 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All M1-VERS validation contract assertions are confirmed working.
